series.curator_notes: Based on the LEGO City franchise; continuous episode numbering from 77+ suggests this is a later season or continuation of earlier numbering

splits.reason: Separate series with simpler format 'Folge X: Title' (vs 'LEGO City: Folge X - Theme - Title'). Shorter episodes (3-15 tracks vs 9-12), different structure, and separate episode numbering. Episodes 11-20 conflicted with this series. Parent would see this as a different product.

review.notes: The split separates two distinct LEGO City audio series: (1) 'LEGO City: Folge X - Theme' which has episodes 1-23 in the main series, and (2) 'Folge X: Title' (Kompakt series) which has episodes 11-106. The 'Kompakt' series has shorter episodes (fewer tracks, no intro/outro music) and a different naming convention. Previously excluded episodes 24 and 25 are included in the new series via the split.

verification.concerns: Concerns remain about the large number of duplicate episode numbers across both series (Ep 11-20 appear in both). However, this appears intentional as each series covers different content - the main series uses the "LEGO City: Folge X - Theme - Title" naming pattern while the Kompakt series uses the simpler "Folge X: Title" pattern.
